title: calophyllum whitfordii
intro: Calophyllum whitfordii, also known as White Beach Calophyllum, is a species of evergreen tree that is native to Australia and is often found in tropical coastal regions. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Calophyllum whitfordii include wound healing, anti-aging, and antiseptic properties, making it useful for treating skin conditions such as acne, eczema, and wounds. Calophyllum whitfordii is typically prepared as an oil or extract, which can be used topically or taken internally, and is also used in traditional herbal medicine to promote overall well-being.
